name: Avon Products, Inc.
description: Avon Products, Inc. is a multi-level marketing company in the beauty, household, and personal care categories. Founded in 1886, the company sells its products through a network of independent sales representatives globally. Avon's product line includes cosmetics, skincare, fragrance, and personal care items, as well as fashion and home products. It is recognized as one of the world's largest direct-selling enterprises, empowering women through entrepreneurship and beauty.
